libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system-property setup is needed. Meaningful coverage should be written as Scala 3 test code that imports io.circe.literal._ and exercises the json string interpolator, including literal JSON and interpolation of primitive/collection values into JSON values and keys.
risks: The library’s primary API is a Scala 3 inline macro/string interpolator; Java-only tests or tests that only load classes would not provide meaningful coverage.

Native Image verification remains authoritative because the interpolator expands at compile time while the resulting runtime path primarily exercises circe Json construction and transitive circe-core/circe-jawn behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed. The artifact’s normal compile/runtime dependencies include circe-core_3 and circe-jawn_3, and a normal Scala 3 scaffold with the Scala compiler can compile meaningful uses of the json string interpolator.
